word: H5264 - נָסַס - nâçaç - naw-sas' - Lift up as an ensign

sections.paragraph:
Original: נסס

Transliteration: nâsas

Phonetic: naw-sas'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be lifted up (meaning dubious)
    1. (Hithpoel) to be lifted up, be displayed

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1379

Part(s) of speech: Verb
